title: Computer Mating Service
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Computer mating services''', or '''CMS''', were used by the [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] in order to conceive offspring, since they could not mate naturally due to a lack of reproductive organs. It matched the DNA of prospective mates that would generate a favored child pattern. The process took a year to complete.
